top.headline: Trump says "I don't care if negotiations with Iran are over" as Iran vows to block Hormuz

main.text: BREAKING: Trump: "I don't care if negotiations with Iran are over."

perspectives.text: IT'S OFFICIAL: The US military just launched MULTIPLE STRIKES against Iran... The mullahs are continuously screwing up. MAXIMUM PRESSURE is the only way.
perspectives.note: Direct from primary high-velocity account celebrating self-defense strikes and maximum pressure doctrine.

perspectives.text: BREAKING: Iran announces it is ending all negotiations with the US and vows to "completely" block the Strait of Hormuz, per CNBC.
perspectives.note: Highest-fidelity market + timeline signal. Minimal partisan overlay.

perspectives.text: Asked today how he feels about negotiations with Iran collapsing, Trump said, "I couldn't care less." You'd think the president of the United States would care about service members dying and millions paying more for gas because of his illegal and unconstitutional war.
perspectives.note: Direct quote with strong opinion framing on 'illegal war' and causation.

top.note: Triangulated across high-velocity primary sources from all three sides. Bernie quote verbatim; Iran statement matches CNBC wire; conservative reaction sourced from the live thread, not a screenshot.

top.headline: ICE operations at Delaney Hall face protests as authorities arrest violators

main.text: 🚨 LMFAO!! This THUG has been RUNNING HIS MOUTH after violating NJ curfew outside ICE... police just stormed up behind him and he was SWEPT AWAY in half a second 🤣 FAFO!

perspectives.text: This THUG has been RUNNING HIS MOUTH after violating NJ curfew outside ICE... police just stormed up behind him and he was SWEPT AWAY in half a second. FAFO!
perspectives.note: High engagement post celebrating swift enforcement against curfew violators and protesters.

perspectives.text: ICE agent standing guard at Delaney Hall sports a Hulk green Rolex Submariner over his “We The People” tattoo
perspectives.note: Viral visual post showing ICE presence.

perspectives.text: Tonight. Outside of Delaney Hall. Me and other protestors were tear gassed and shot at with rubber bullets by the state police. Not ICE.

top.note: Reporting accurate on incident location and timeline; partisan framing differs sharply between sides. Independent perspective from local news is most fact-driven.

top.note: Valuation data is accurate per cited source. Forward-looking commentary is opinion, not fact — different perspectives interpret the same number very differently.

main.text: Send the video to everyone you know showing how heinously Nowak was treated by the police in his dying moments and how the police cravenly kowtowed to his murderer. Legacy mainstream media, same ones who wrote about George Floyd millions of times, are dead silent about Nowak.

perspectives.text: Send the video to everyone you know showing how heinously Nowak was treated by the police in his dying moments and how the police cravenly kowtowed to his murderer. Legacy mainstream media... are dead silent about Nowak.

perspectives.text: Britain had a moment of silence for George Floyd... Henry Nowak *was* British and his treatment by the police was shocking... Yet there is no minute of silence... And we all know why.

perspectives.text: Did they show or even mention the Henry Nowak footage? Legacy Media… CNN: No MSNBC: No ABC News: No CBS News: No NBC News: No USA Today: No New York Times: No Washington Post: No
